Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0800 "PIXELCITYSKATER-0800" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pixel City Skater (Digital Monastery - 2014).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Changed the JSR $F1CA instruction at $088C to JMP $08D3 to skip the trainer.
